title: Add customer search, job filtering, and PDF estimate export

requirements.text: Add a search input field to the CustomersPage component that filters the displayed customer list in real-time as the user types, matching against customer name, phone number, email, or address fields

quotes: Customer Search & Filters - Add search functionality to quickly find customers by name, phone, or address

acceptanceCriteria: Search input field appears at the top of the customers list
Typing in the search field immediately filters the customer cards below
Search matches partial text in name, phone, email, or address fields (case-insensitive)
Clearing the search input shows all customers again
Search state persists while navigating away and returning to the page

requirements.text: Implement filter buttons or a dropdown on the JobsPage that allows viewing jobs filtered by status: 'All Jobs', 'Scheduled', 'In Progress', and 'Completed', replacing or enhancing the existing tab-based filtering system

quotes: Job Filters - Add filtering options on the Jobs page to view only scheduled, in-progress, or completed jobs

acceptanceCriteria: Filter controls appear prominently on the Jobs page above the job list
Selecting 'Scheduled' shows only jobs with status 'scheduled'
Selecting 'In Progress' shows only jobs with status 'in-progress'
Selecting 'Completed' shows only jobs with status 'completed'
Selecting 'All Jobs' shows all jobs regardless of status
Active filter state is visually indicated
Job count updates to reflect the filtered results

requirements.text: Add a 'Download PDF' or 'Export as PDF' button to the EstimatesPage component that generates a professionally formatted PDF document containing all estimate details including square footage breakdown, materials line items with quantities and costs, labor calculation, all subtotals, and the grand total

quotes: Export Estimates as PDF - Generate professional PDF versions of your estimates for email distribution

acceptanceCriteria: Download PDF button appears on the EstimatesPage near the save/load controls
Clicking the button generates a PDF file with professional formatting
PDF includes Phoenix Shield branding (logo and colors)
PDF displays square footage section with amount, price per sq ft, and subtotal
PDF lists all materials line items with name, quantity, unit cost, and subtotals
PDF shows labor hours, hourly rate, and labor subtotal
PDF displays the grand total prominently
PDF includes estimate creation date
PDF downloads automatically to the user's device
Success notification appears after PDF generation

requirements.text: Add a 'Download PDF' or 'Export as PDF' button to each estimate card on the SavedEstimatesPage that generates a PDF for that specific saved estimate with the same professional formatting as the EstimatesPage PDF export

quotes: Export Estimates as PDF - Generate professional PDF versions of your estimates for email distribution

acceptanceCriteria: Each estimate card on SavedEstimatesPage displays a PDF download button
Clicking the button generates a PDF for that specific estimate
PDF formatting matches the EstimatesPage PDF export format
PDF includes all estimate details and Phoenix Shield branding
PDF downloads automatically to the user's device
Button has appropriate loading state during PDF generation

requirements.text: Add a 'Download PDF' or 'Export as PDF' button to the estimates section on the CustomerDetailPage that generates a PDF for the selected estimate associated with that customer

quotes: Export Estimates as PDF - Generate professional PDF versions of your estimates for email distribution

acceptanceCriteria: PDF download button appears next to each estimate in the customer's estimates section
Clicking the button generates a PDF for that estimate
PDF includes customer information (name, contact details) at the top
PDF formatting is consistent with other PDF exports in the application
Success notification appears after PDF generation

constraints: Do not modify the backend Motoko code - all features are frontend-only implementations
Maintain the existing tab-based filtering system on JobsPage if present, or replace it cleanly without breaking existing functionality
Use a client-side PDF generation library compatible with React (such as jsPDF or react-pdf)
Preserve the existing Phoenix Shield branding (logo, colors) in all PDF exports
Do not change the immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity hooks, useActor.ts, main.tsx, and components/ui
nonGoals: Backend storage or server-side PDF generation
Email integration to send PDFs directly from the app
PDF template customization UI beyond the standard format
Advanced search features like saved search filters or search history
Export formats other than PDF (Excel, CSV, etc.)
Batch PDF export for multiple estimates at once
